Start Your Clothing Brand with Low MOQ Manufacturing

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Starting a clothing brand is exciting — but finding a manufacturer willing to work with small quantities can feel impossible. Most factories require 300-500 piece minimums. FABRIOZA is different. We built our startup manufacturing program specifically for new brands, with MOQ starting at just 50 pieces and hands-on support at every step.

Why Most Manufacturers Reject Startups

Traditional clothing manufacturers are optimized for large volumes. Setting up a production line — creating patterns, sourcing fabric, calibrating machines — requires significant upfront work. For a factory, this setup cost must be spread across many units to be profitable. That's why 300-500 piece minimums are standard.

At FABRIOZA, we've streamlined our setup process and invested in flexible production lines that can efficiently handle smaller runs. Combined with Pakistan's competitive labor costs, we can profitably manufacture from 50 pieces while maintaining ISO 9001 quality standards.

Our Startup Manufacturing Program

Low MOQ: 50 Pieces Per Style

Test your designs with real customers before committing to large inventory. 50 pieces is enough for a small launch, pre-order campaign, or influencer seeding.

Free Design Mockup

Send us your sketch, reference image, or Pinterest board. Our designers create a professional mockup within 24 hours — completely free.

Low-Cost Sampling

Your first physical sample costs just $50-80 (deducted from your bulk order). See and feel your product before investing in production.

Flexible Sizing

Start with 2-3 sizes instead of a full size run. Add sizes as your brand grows. No penalties for smaller size distributions.

Graduated Pricing

QuantityCost Per Unit (T-Shirt Example)Total Investment
50 pieces$8-12$400-600
100 pieces$6-9$600-900
250 pieces$5-7$1,250-1,750
500 pieces$4-6$2,000-3,000
1,000 pieces$3-5$3,000-5,000

The Startup Journey with FABRIOZA

  1. Idea Phase: Share your concept — we'll advise on feasibility and pricing
  2. Design Phase: Free mockups and tech pack guidance
  3. Sample Phase: Physical sample in 5-7 days for approval
  4. Launch Phase: 50-piece production run to test the market
  5. Growth Phase: Scale quantities as demand grows

Frequently Asked Questions

Is 50 pieces really enough to start?

Yes, 50 pieces is ideal for testing designs, running pre-order campaigns, or seeding influencers. Many successful brands started with 50-100 pieces.

Do I need a tech pack to start?

No. We can work from sketches, reference photos, or even detailed descriptions. Our design team helps create production-ready specs.

How much does it cost to start?

Sample: $50-80. First 50-piece order: $400-900 depending on the product. No hidden fees.

Can I start with one product?

Absolutely. Many brands launch with a single signature piece (one hoodie style, one tee design) and expand from there.

Do you help with design?

Yes, our free mockup service includes design guidance. We can also recommend trending styles, colors, and fits for your target market.
